current_earliest_blocker.detail: mc-server/server.jar, server.properties, and manually accepted eula.txt are absent; localhost:25565 has no Minecraft server; 127.0.0.1:3000 is an unrelated TCP service and fails the Singularity health protocol

prior_findings: BenchmarkRunner does not apply canonical starting inventories or teleport/daytime reset before M1 tasks
The source definition for BM-004 currently requires 3 cobblestone while the canonical protocol requires 5
BenchmarkTask.timeout_cycles is not passed into Agent.run_goal, which currently uses a fixed 100-cycle limit
Default benchmark configuration still enables policy skills, memory/context layers, coaching, vision, visual grounding, and other modules excluded from the fixed M1 acceptance profile
harness_audit.patch_summary: Added shared m1-fixed-v1 definitions, allowlisted observed reset postconditions, BM-004=5, task cycle/duration limits, forced RuleBasedPlanner isolation, strict navigation and action-transition evidence, fresh one-task episodes, immutable result/session hashes, and duplicate/server-jar rejection.
harness_audit.offline_retest: passed: all 28 Python standalone test files and all 4 Node test files; pytest aggregation was unavailable because pytest is not installed
harness_audit.acceptance_effect: The source harness is ready for the first controlled live BM-001 attempt, but contributes zero live successes until G0 passes.

failures.suspected_root_cause: Historical move_to reported success without displacement or tolerance proof, allowing repeated no-progress exploration
failures.root_cause: Historical move_to reported success without displacement or tolerance proof, allowing repeated no-progress exploration
failures.change_since_attempt: Pathfinder navigation now requires final-distance verification and defers dependent suffixes when unreached; no live rerun exists
failures.patch_commit_or_summary: Strict pathfinder tolerance, reached=true evidence, dependent-suffix deferral, close resource approach, bounded pickup wait, and state-delta validation are implemented in the current worktree.
failures.retest_result: offline regression passed; live BM-001 retest blocked by G0 runtime provisioning
failures.next_test: After G0/G1, run BM-001 and require reached=true plus final_distance<=tolerance on every successful move

failures.suspected_root_cause: Canonical starting inventory of four oak planks was not applied, so the planner remained blocked with no executable transition
failures.root_cause: Canonical starting inventory of four oak planks was not applied, so the planner remained blocked with no executable transition

failures.next_test: Verify reset pre/post inventory equals exactly four oak planks before issuing the craft goal

failures.retest_result: offline reset/workbench-grounding tests passed; no live retest behind G0
failures.next_test: Verify reset inventory before planning and craft success from the observed inventory delta

failures.root_cause: Starting wooden pickaxe was not applied; source success criteria also drifted from canonical five cobblestone to three

failures.next_test: Set and observe one wooden pickaxe, require five cobblestone, and prove each dig/pickup through pre/post state

failures.root_cause: The controlled Paper 1.20.4 server assets and manually accepted EULA are not provisioned; no code-only action can create an acceptance-eligible world.
failures.patch_commit_or_summary: Prepared a one-command fresh-episode runner, protocol-aware preflight, verified reset, deterministic profile, state-transition checks, and immutable evidence for the next live attempt.
